EmailTemplate.description: Warning letter to inform rent is overdue
EmailTemplate.name: Rent Alert Warning
EmailTemplate.subject: Reminder: Rent Date Past Due
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hello! This email is remind you that your rent for Lease {!leaseworks__Lease__c.Name} was due on {!leaseworks__Lease__c.leaseworks__Rent_Due_Day__c}. Please send the payment to ensure compliance with lease terms.
Thank you, Your LeaseWare Administror
